title: FAMILY BIRTH CENTER - 211info
text: SKY LAKES MEDICAL CENTER FAMILY BIRTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers childbirth classes, lactation consultations, and Baby Beginnings, a class for first-time parents. The program also provides prenatal, delivery, and postnatal care, as well as well-baby checkups and obstetric and gynecological services. 2865 Daggett Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 882-6311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 882-6311 Main phone Main phone (541) 882-6311 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Some private insurance plans accepted. Fees and billing vary by service. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Delivery/Childbirth Obstetrics/Gynecology Postpartum Care Prenatal Care Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL AND EMERGENCY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
